title: Merge Sorted Array
hints: Since both input arrays are already sorted, you can determine the order of elements by comparing their current heads without re-sorting everything.
Use two pointers to track the current element in each array and pick the smaller one to place next in the merged result.
If you merge into a new array, start filling from the beginning; if modifying in-place, consider filling from the end to avoid overwriting unmerged data.
